items.title: [正面] One of the absolute best pieces of media I have ev...
items.summary:
One of the absolute best pieces of media I have ever experienced. The music, story, art(both background and character), writing, characterization, PVs, breadth of topics touched on, story pacing; I could just keep going on. Absolutely astounding game with an(at this point) amazing EN translation for most of the main content. All of that is just the visual novel aspect.

The gameplay is like slay the spire but as a teambuilder and actually deep mechanics. There are four 'realms' that characters fall in to that determines *generally* what they are geared towards, and you are able to mix and match two realms at a time in an individual team. There are quite a lot of possible team combinations possible, even at end game where you need 5 teams with all unique 'gear' relative to each other to clear difficult challenges in one of the endgame modes called D-tide. General difficulty progression also feels pretty natural; there are definitely some jumps but in my journey i never really felt too out of depth/not able to progress if I re-evaluated my strategies/decision making. 

As a gacha, I'd consider it sort of a soft gacha? They absolutely hemorrhage roll currency at you constantly via events and rewards for clearing ♥♥♥♥, and considering they just crested their second anniversary, there is a metric ton of content to be able to experience/clear that also give a ton of currency. As someone who is generally a dolphin/whale, I haven't really felt compelled to spend past the monthly card and battlepass due to a combo of just how many rolls i have available at all times, and the fact that dropping money into the packs are kind of a bad investment for the price lmao. 

The overall community is pretty solid; definitely has some iffy patches and they love their memes a little too much where if you are a new player, take any information given to you with a grain of salt since the community 'lore' is referenced constantly in guides and discussion. But generally asking a question in the official discord will get you a solid smattering of solid, genuine answers. 

I went into this game wanting to just casually pick at it while i waited for other things to come out, since i vaguely remembered when it came out and everything was MTL'd questionably, so I wanted to let it cook, but holy ♥♥♥♥ they delivered. Quite literally one of the best games I have ever played, and will continue to play this in perpetuity. 10/10

items.summary: beautiful game, even the gacha system is incredibly generous
